positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial mountain range bathed in golden-hour light. The mountains are composed of abstract, geometric rock formations, connected by glowing nebulae pathways. The sky is a gradient blend of deep indigo, warm gold, and soft lavender. Central composition featuring a single, stylized crescent moon and a cluster of abstract star constellations. The overall aesthetic is cosmic, serene, and modern abstract, suitable for high-contrast screen printing on fabric. Clean lines, solid color blocks, strong negative space.
